center.name: Trancoso, Bahia
center.summary: Trancoso, Bahia是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Bahia antwren，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Bahia antwren is found in coastal Bahia, Brazil, from south of Salvador to the area of Transcoso

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Bahia antwren is found in coastal Bahia, Brazil, from south of Salvador to the area of Transcoso
